news.title:
Sanofi India board recommends Rs.48/share final dividend for FY25, subject to AGM approval.
Dividend taxable with TDS; shareholders must update PAN, bank details by Apr 15, 2026.
news.summary:
Sanofi India board recommends Rs.48/share final dividend for FY25, subject to AGM approval.
Dividend taxable with TDS; shareholders must update PAN, bank details by Apr 15, 2026.

news.title:
Sanofi India Ltd schedules its 70th AGM on April 29, 2026, via video conferencing as per SEBI guidelines.
Key agenda includes audited financials, dividends, director appointments, and related party transactions approval.
news.summary:
Sanofi India Ltd schedules its 70th AGM on April 29, 2026, via video conferencing as per SEBI guidelines.
Key agenda includes audited financials, dividends, director appointments, and related party transactions approval.

news.title:
Sanofi India sets AGM for 29th April 2026 via video conferencing.
Final dividend of Rs. 48/share for FY25; Siraj Azmat Chaudhry appointed Independent Director.
news.summary:
Sanofi India sets AGM for 29th April 2026 via video conferencing.
Final dividend of Rs. 48/share for FY25; Siraj Azmat Chaudhry appointed Independent Director.

news.title:
Sanofi India Ltd to hold analyst/investor meetings in Mumbai on April 1, 2026.
Meetings will share publicly available information; no UPSI to be disclosed.
news.summary:
Sanofi India Ltd to hold analyst/investor meetings in Mumbai on April 1, 2026.
Meetings will share publicly available information; no UPSI to be disclosed.

news.title:
Sanofi India hit a 52-week low at Rs 3,202.7 on 24 Mar 2026.
The stock declined 7.2% over five consecutive losing sessions.
news.summary:
Sanofi India hit a 52-week low at Rs 3,202.7 on 24 Mar 2026.
The stock declined 7.2% over five consecutive losing sessions.

news.title:
Sanofi India held an earnings call to discuss its Q4 and FY 2025 financials, showing a 1% profit before tax growth despite domestic sales being flat.
Key highlights include 6% growth in insulin sales and stabilization in partnership sales, while export revenues declined due to prior divestment of the Ankleshwar site.
news.summary:
Sanofi India held an earnings call to discuss its Q4 and FY 2025 financials, showing a 1% profit before tax growth despite domestic sales being flat.
Key highlights include 6% growth in insulin sales and stabilization in partnership sales, while export revenues declined due to prior divestment of the Ankleshwar site.

news.title:
Sanofi Consumer reports Dec 2025 net sales of Rs 251 cr, up 47% YoY.
Quarterly net profit rises 50% YoY to Rs 66.5 cr; EPS reaches Rs 28.87.
news.summary:
Sanofi Consumer reports Dec 2025 net sales of Rs 251 cr, up 47% YoY.
Quarterly net profit rises 50% YoY to Rs 66.5 cr; EPS reaches Rs 28.87.

news.title:
Sanofi India sees flat domestic sales in 2025, with 1% PBT growth.
Focus remains on diabetes franchise (31% insulin share) and cost cuts (17% lower OPEX).
news.summary:
Sanofi India sees flat domestic sales in 2025, with 1% PBT growth.
Focus remains on diabetes franchise (31% insulin share) and cost cuts (17% lower OPEX).

news.title:
Sanofi India Ltd shared an investor presentation on its Q4 2025 and FY 2025 results, highlighting business model transformation for sustainable growth.
Key focus areas include insulin franchise growth, digital AI initiatives, and market expansion. Q4 profit before tax grew 27%, with dividends proposed for 2025.
news.summary:
Sanofi India Ltd shared an investor presentation on its Q4 2025 and FY 2025 results, highlighting business model transformation for sustainable growth.
Key focus areas include insulin franchise growth, digital AI initiatives, and market expansion. Q4 profit before tax grew 27%, with dividends proposed for 2025.

news.title: Sanofi India shares fell over 3% after Q4 results.
news.summary: Sanofi India shares fell over 3% after Q4 results.

news.title: Sanofi India proposes a final dividend of Rs 48 per share.
news.summary: Sanofi India proposes a final dividend of Rs 48 per share.

news.title:
Sanofi India reports Q3 net profit of 617M rupees, down from 913M YoY.
Q3 revenue declines to 4.2B rupees from 5.15B rupees YoY.
news.summary:
Sanofi India reports Q3 net profit of 617M rupees, down from 913M YoY.
Q3 revenue declines to 4.2B rupees from 5.15B rupees YoY.

news.title:
Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India reports 50.1% rise in net profit for Dec 2025 quarter.
Sales surged 47% to Rs 251 crore, as per Capital Market Live News.
news.summary:
Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India reports 50.1% rise in net profit for Dec 2025 quarter.
Sales surged 47% to Rs 251 crore, as per Capital Market Live News.

news.title:
Sanofi India faces FY21-22 tax demand of ₹237 cr, including ₹134 cr tax.
Tax credit claims for FY20-21 were rejected; company plans to appeal order.
news.summary:
Sanofi India faces FY21-22 tax demand of ₹237 cr, including ₹134 cr tax.
Tax credit claims for FY20-21 were rejected; company plans to appeal order.

news.title:
Sanofi expects slightly negative vaccine sales in 2026 due to U.S. policy shifts and debates affecting coverage rates.
Sanofi seeks growth beyond Dupixent's patent expiry, focusing on strategic acquisitions like Blueprint Medicines for Ayvakit.
news.summary:
Sanofi expects slightly negative vaccine sales in 2026 due to U.S. policy shifts and debates affecting coverage rates.
Sanofi seeks growth beyond Dupixent's patent expiry, focusing on strategic acquisitions like Blueprint Medicines for Ayvakit.

news.title:
Sanofi India faces Rs 3.56 crore tax demand for FY19, including tax, interest, and penalty.
The demand stems from non-submission of vendor GST confirmation; company plans to appeal.
news.summary:
Sanofi India faces Rs 3.56 crore tax demand for FY19, including tax, interest, and penalty.
The demand stems from non-submission of vendor GST confirmation; company plans to appeal.

news.title:
Sanofi India's market evaluation revised due to subdued financial results.
Persistent stock underperformance noted in the Pharmaceuticals Biotechnology sector.
news.summary:
Sanofi India's market evaluation revised due to subdued financial results.
Persistent stock underperformance noted in the Pharmaceuticals Biotechnology sector.

news.title:
Corona Remedies boosts Myoril brand sales from ₹27-28 crore to ₹90 crore in 2 years with an 800 bps margin rise.
Ahead of its ₹655-crore IPO, the firm sees 10.09% stake divestment; ChrysCapital to offload 6.59%.
news.summary:
Corona Remedies boosts Myoril brand sales from ₹27-28 crore to ₹90 crore in 2 years with an 800 bps margin rise.
Ahead of its ₹655-crore IPO, the firm sees 10.09% stake divestment; ChrysCapital to offload 6.59%.
